title: Avarage Backpacks
description: A simple Backpack mod for the Friends of nostalgia
body:
🧳 Average Backpacks

Average Backpacks is a simple but useful survival-friendly mod that adds five different backpacks to Minecraft.
Each backpack gives you extra storage space, helping you carry more items on your adventures without being overpowered.

🎒 Available Backpacks

Leather Backpack – The most basic backpack, crafted from leather. Provides a small amount of extra storage.

Copper Backpack – A step up from leather, made from copper. Offers more slots for your items.

Iron Backpack – Strong and reliable, crafted from iron ingots. Expands your carrying capacity even further.

Diamond Backpack – Durable and spacious, made from precious diamonds. Great for longer journeys.

Emerald Backpack – The rarest and most valuable backpack. Crafted from emeralds, it provides the largest inventory space in this mod.

⚖️ Features & Balance

Backpacks are not stackable to prevent infinite storage abuse.

Each tier must be crafted from the previous backpack + valuable materials.

Designed to fit well into Survival gameplay – useful, but not overpowered.![Recipe1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/237ffbd024d8bbbfb4ca8a3181b87762b6e309d7_0.webp)![Recipe2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed820f2b096ff79b2507d1d59226f5296f9e2a87_0.webp)![Craftingrecipe3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f14b88ceec7684fa01bde6fb8d6b03b9d5006d11_0.webp)![Craftingrecipe4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea01048fa87e19f56b0939c7db543cbee5fd06e0_0.webp)![CraftingRecipe5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0bd8c34b95bfb0b4350cf954dc0670de0a0e280f_0.webp)
